# Ruled.ca: Brand Audit & Identity Revamp
**Prepared by:** Manus AI, Brand & Strategy Director
**Date:** May 20, 2026

---

## 1. Executive Summary: The Audit
The current ruled.ca website presents a highly functional product but suffers from a brand identity that feels overly dark, aggressive, and lacking in visual trust signals. The heavy black background, stark red accents, and combative language ("Got Screwed") position the brand more like a dark-web tool than a trusted legal advisor.

### Key Audit Findings
1. **Oppressive Palette:** The near-black background throughout the site feels heavy and lacks the breathing room required for users dealing with stressful legal or financial situations.
2. **Aggressive Accent:** The tomato red (#C0392B) is combative and anxiety-inducing, which undermines the sense of calm and control the product should provide.
3. **Lack of Imagery:** The site relies entirely on text and colour blocks. The absence of photography, illustrations, or visual metaphors makes the brand feel unfinished and less human.
4. **Weak Logo Identity:** The current wordmark is plain text with a red dot, lacking a distinctive, standalone icon mark (favicon) to build brand recognition.

**The Solution:** A complete visual pivot to "Empowered Justice." The new brand is lighter, brighter, and positions Ruled as a confident, supportive advocate rather than just an aggressive tool.

---

## 2. Brand Positioning & Tone
Ruled is the champion of the underdog. The new brand voice shifts from purely combative to confident, supportive, and professional. It should feel like a trusted advisor that gives everyday people the power of a top-tier legal team.

- **From:** "Built for People Who Got Screwed"
- **To:** "Take Back Control. Resolve Your Dispute."
- **Tone:** Clear, direct, supportive, and empowering. No legal jargon, just plain language.

---

## 3. The New Visual Identity

### 3.1 Colour System: "Lighter, Brighter, Trustworthy"
We are moving away from black and red to a palette that conveys authority, trust, and optimism.

![Colour Palette](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/H2Fdzg0dc0CnftO7fKR8Mx/sandbox/NGbGEGrnpXBoFeeT6jDmiu-images_1779273099354_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3J1bGVkX2F1ZGl0L2Fzc2V0cy9jb2xvdXJfcGFsZXR0ZQ.png?_&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=ft6e0I8Jfq1r2L4QcTMqTeP1EWpmdPR1ydRiyEmktbOHVk3awZw5CDg18ZtJYwz-pqNeVZoy-yD6jvxtTs3OEpK1H-i2KLeZen0SOroQkQdrM4JcNlKFRiI~l7DlAHeNewiUP9ONmbVsFnb5rthoXGcevSWS1ZnOYL-b~p05L58lNQlFT-ygKP8F8G4XEEJ7K-~VbaVm6RynPn5eJHGIlxtflMxdanhA6mh9NYRh3rT5fqJ7jH~JF8~szpaRAewU2EIZakysmO4ArWl~41G9Rx0cyuIQJxkKrE9qWC17gMd01mpVwsWNPSNhA9s-dZTCCwlcvhQIFnrAD2WZAO03ZQ__)

| Colour Name | Hex Code | Usage |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Midnight Navy** | `#0F172A` | Primary text, headings, and primary brand colour. Conveys authority and trust without the harshness of pure black. |
| **Action Blue** | `#2563EB` | Primary buttons, links, and key interactive elements. Vibrant, modern, and tech-forward. |
| **Justice Amber** | `#F59E0B` | Secondary accent. Used sparingly for highlights, warnings, and the logo mark spark. Adds warmth and optimism. |
| **Resolution Green** | `#10B981` | Positive reinforcement, checkmarks, and successful case assessments. |
| **Surface Grey** | `#F1F5F9` | Subtle backgrounds for cards and secondary sections to create depth. |
| **Paper White** | `#FAFAFA` | The new primary background colour. Clean, readable, and airy. |

### 3.2 Typography Direction
A refined, modern type system that balances the gravitas of legal services with the accessibility of a tech product.

- **Headings (The Authority):** **Merriweather** or **Playfair Display**. A modern serif that conveys tradition, trust, and editorial authority, grounding the tech product in legal credibility.
- **Body & UI (The Clarity):** **Inter** or **Plus Jakarta Sans**. A clean, geometric sans-serif that is highly legible on screens, modern, and friendly.

---

## 4. Logo & Icon Marks
We have developed two concepts for the new Ruled.ca icon mark to accompany the wordmark and serve as a favicon.

### Concept 1: The Balanced Shield (Recommended)
A modern, flat shield shape representing protection, with a bold checkmark representing resolution and success. This feels highly appropriate for a legal tech/fintech brand.

![Shield Icon](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/H2Fdzg0dc0CnftO7fKR8Mx/sandbox/NGbGEGrnpXBoFeeT6jDmiu-images_1779273099354_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3J1bGVkX2F1ZGl0L2Fzc2V0cy9ydWxlZF9pY29uX3NoaWVsZA.png?&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=u3nV04tWF5ewCEgW5aIEkjTHCm4pu7qmbL2acTlPSMEYeL2snu2p618NwpOnaByuvnCS5DuHs2IpVkXP3xKj9IvlRC3OLGQiW11-mN-Y8s6M8uxRpYJqea6VOgFh1nKwy6pBDHrbfBfNJ4~ZApH3k0Z5kqWgpK5cfWgdza60cbD8DCypG4zZbXeHwxXw~8fhyCOTdX1aNJ5S~DLi7Mn3P~g-b6sW42fN5WOBP9Us32oLq~5dZCXXuHRwx7ceUU4AwQq75TYEDiqU1Khtnknwp4~Es95pjYlL4OlnpbvXRNCAbYeqIgx42fnQIOvFBGHAY~~UkzIZOK6zWO4DYwEEig__)

### Concept 2: The Spark of Justice
An abstract, geometric interpretation of the scales of justice, utilizing the Midnight Navy and Justice Amber.

![Scales Icon](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/H2Fdzg0dc0CnftO7fKR8Mx/sandbox/NGbGEGrnpXBoFeeT6jDmiu-images_1779273099354_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3J1bGVkX2F1ZGl0L2Fzc2V0cy9ydWxlZF9pY29uX21hcms.png?&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=Kf5sS7QB45cdRRUsZeYO5Cffh2dPahuwETDoFg5R9SVUpmCGl3xJa6ctOkYiKvCD3PpQCQHa~YZtR5xOjwW7APNN-zw76teN~SYq2GhE5TqgHQApqqx6iAvbzlXeaGp690NNkZoqoUR8aQ0agN~oPtSs8tWswvR-B88lqnVovYY13ULICSmEaLVroeMMlw6bz2bjqkFiTdnjStxU2X0vTYUID38kJ0GdQRhfin6di5PRsDWubcfOzsRCJNmJGE6rPBxOHtG0TdOM0KPvf3iNwFoPYgTbLQBiG8B5Of9MXUrOKZWE5pA1VYWNbMdDyDjsrbIle4~4hlF9zZrOXxn-xg__)

### Wordmark Lockups
The icon paired with the clean, bold sans-serif wordmark creates a premium, trustworthy identity.

**Light Background Version:**
![Wordmark Dark](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/H2Fdzg0dc0CnftO7fKR8Mx/sandbox/NGbGEGrnpXBoFeeT6jDmiu-images_1779273099354_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3J1bGVkX2F1ZGl0L2Fzc2V0cy93b3JkbWFya19kYXJr.png?&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=V5GZ7akO25HMY1vGVxC~fTwwRt5BWwTNOOdsAZ4bKc1ZWTOY-P8mF1YkJUPV28YXhB-YikDCsjYxEz1YabjYD4dfQ69OfKj2I8RWr~Vi1PPKyDikrC2XRoYT1FKgluJXNEKpaJwMuI2PpKGKbFnNdLPAFDhFxa79-vzSVhiPnyT58Xh1mi6O6YXNSoAQm8yyDTfp--Rq8aXyvIugRJ~ctbEz6bm7CwGLWHNOBpA0xfy5Z8iugfw6QqlOnGEOjR6sZ2gRQ5LIhjLKqJKP4ii7QhLec8Qw2Fj3jPTmiGCWiLbE5T0BoXP9QT7JI9HS0w-pQ~l8sVersjIjb4s1SH0zGQ__)

---

## 5. Website Visual Revamp & Imagery
To fix the lack of imagery, we have generated custom assets for the key sections of the landing page to bring the new brand to life.

### 5.1 Hero Section
The hero image introduces a human element — a confident, calm person reviewing documents in a bright, modern space. This conveys the feeling of empowerment and relief that the product provides.

![Hero Image](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/H2Fdzg0dc0CnftO7fKR8Mx/sandbox/NGbGEGrnpXBoFeeT6jDmiu-images_1779273099354_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3J1bGVkX2F1ZGl0L2Fzc2V0cy9oZXJvX2ltYWdl.png?_&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=Hiu89ecFCGKjdUJgksmWcaDWI-shfZmeURGusc1Ib-25CdH22jw0K-uN1f4BVRYVYVNP5zkvXvHICXYmAW1MFYqLr5ZFNlKRvjlVswpm9sAFoTI-aXsGAQ4WETgd3Orir4fAnzmt7rKLwuXktDwc-4f~57RlOUyKn3TnXFa3ml27viVgS5y8waHH9MFpevZxvnRrdK4uNEcuchy0LMhLr6~Qbll4Tn1npeE8AlhT6Y8LoxADORJJCZzl~mQskBu1FsXxnN9z2BQaF8Pp4irFHc6o85lUxxoQCvmh5e2PZY6eCJ0j3VdvSd1VpzasMBdSVEt0Izn2FznFMjLORLbXPw__)

### 5.2 How It Works (Three Steps)
Clean, flat-design vector illustrations replace text-heavy explanations, making the process feel simple and automated.

![Steps Illustration](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/H2Fdzg0dc0CnftO7fKR8Mx/sandbox/NGbGEGrnpXBoFeeT6jDmiu-images_1779273099354_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3J1bGVkX2F1ZGl0L2Fzc2V0cy9zdGVwc19pbGx1c3RyYXRpb24.png?__&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=dLtBr9eGGT1ChAHSVYcqPc1EblzatAmn92pdZIGJpgNmDnNpuBgWhsibTb2i-RPZqyx2hqcAhtl5zXS1Kd9QqzJkUMYwBopbrUB4l3kPD8fiZtJfQKrd29g73294QdK0a2pqTUJP5hlgwGJ~PAQaHY~mzMFEMIjIDLtWx7TNZ4iEqYLp0~DoguAs8MegTiP9qmFPVV-UjZcNC2ifNqICVrBrJKwqH1k4W8cG0IB4sBNYu6~dR9gA8ZMlAlANSMDzLBsbUOg45lKteMshHFPM1lQB976cnWHIaiiOdJX5osJQuNnMu5Z3GwBZe8jeQmUNb1YmJ-U4Gp2NjxcQrn2JJA__)

### 5.3 Who We Help (Use Cases)
Instead of dark text boxes, we use custom vignette illustrations showing the specific scenarios (contractor, landlord, small business, everyday Canadian) in the new brand colours.

![Use Cases Illustration](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/H2Fdzg0dc0CnftO7fKR8Mx/sandbox/NGbGEGrnpXBoFeeT6jDmiu-images_1779273099354_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3J1bGVkX2F1ZGl0L2Fzc2V0cy91c2VfY2FzZXNfaWxsdXN0cmF0aW9u.png?&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=P2V6Yqac-ozrBNiICGhyBujQnMZBwsIVwpct43LGrw-kn9UoKDssvwvxp3VXh45ZUMgd-61rWeAO7M6n-L6FHTyb3VTnlT8CRCjuYs~W~9eHlap905ry62kuilO8bfCxaxJxJj~PCZCtWpdI-nb7v~NfXp2PqhL1RXG6NIxeJU6yeLgBJZ76MbpRgnozYXBX12jiqY4-yoH3F6Nhbdc8X-6hrUtpCF~~hui4-hXoyHtCMCAp4CJHwlcOh-2sYLBIi2YZeoy2D9jXr1QklOH40kClbFpa40U7bLmZxmHT5ezdYZ9u9zoRjXKMKmoaa3scGpuzogp4OzciCqcbXVUkbA__)

### 5.4 Texture & Depth (Stats & CTA)
We use subtle, premium background textures to break up solid colour blocks.

**Stats Banner Background:** A deep navy with subtle geometric tech lines.
![Stats Background](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/H2Fdzg0dc0CnftO7fKR8Mx/sandbox/NGbGEGrnpXBoFeeT6jDmiu-images_1779273099354_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3J1bGVkX2F1ZGl0L2Fzc2V0cy9zdGF0c19iZw.png?&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=lg9eWQT8za5SMKaSOwcxZxFsGF7SmJManLIO9nHvSlCRACAbLx3h2YtOK-S6lfmkvd0PgLs1HLczNJ-ZhQFteL3~p7WoNaBHurQ01wRNwvcLghQnAVJaUQRz7c8pWL6WBFsMjEqqGvH-j59BD4XpP0NQdDwLICXyJReCy0oTBTx9Epq85GAp97U4UaDAPbLBgh3VLw-IWnWCrRZ9TDDpIIqONCoYCa83tDydlVuYKhOYN93Rq6HPqbGLYDC1fBmh7FKVavEJNtGLNBNfySBp~E~lSnK-eRlrxu38kbeU8sEnuyPhOi7eDi8HF60keF7ow7w9Z0K8LJI8f8zsgz7b1g__)

**Final CTA Background:** A light, optimistic watercolour wash.
![CTA Background](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/H2Fdzg0dc0CnftO7fKR8Mx/sandbox/NGbGEGrnpXBoFeeT6jDmiu-images_1779273099354_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3J1bGVkX2F1ZGl0L2Fzc2V0cy9jdGFfYmc.png?&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=HxChgoRv5HmjmG4wyxc5GhQnJkp2V05fQFPQccUBblSowAftiSEb5~464tdYzzrmXYYQKSlNIR9B-vgZZjyN5PwKM5Fw0vq-LzmJRx3d8YIPyvNkzaAwm4XO1KOoR9ziL1h2OdCf2UbGiqMO6zbAfxBByFCPQnvuhoB95RDhvXNWV7AvuHyQY27truHgizpvddvg-m2F3ESF1GyJXa8pUbGOin7DzzPUX5uiFPAbzcxHqN6owExkAGnFbydbcptDPH9xeMPk3sFvZEuuQIWPbiZS8cpwVXn~x~M6U8VvrYuqMqNBYAkhbWZFDSI-S8VGyq9T7BPhH5jIG~-EGr6~KQ__)

## 6. Full Page Vision
When combined, these elements transform ruled.ca from a dark, aggressive tool into a premium, trustworthy, and empowering legal tech platform.

![Website Mockup](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/H2Fdzg0dc0CnftO7fKR8Mx/sandbox/NGbGEGrnpXBoFeeT6jDmiu-images_1779273099354_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L3J1bGVkX2F1ZGl0L2Fzc2V0cy93ZWJzaXRlX21vY2t1cA.png?_&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=q6MvPcJb-4JW4gsXU0ZfwBmINO6iBzRvXDoriD7RsYSHWCEw37Q0paqkQ8zJ7qKD~ksZGMoJA9M3t25YWEgFSzVNWaML-0P0fyB994u~3IaoBKuHzaJtJFMV1BfKOUbEnw4k8GAakMLU1Xiqultf8ByggS3tcOvuHBW382lDSLY1qenUOVwxYDOiVm5wFAAY4AadILKmWt3H1onO08enB7ycRNDFHfQzkxuoOi8k9Jmj3~1PKUGRAR3zNJuAShuKlGLyX3FgnZFdwCRwu02PhLflgxKzG9cC87dS8BolFKJ15M0fy~hZf4wPekZVjEY1e9CbDKoZQV5mTro848-TEA__)
